name: messagestudio
author: Taako
description: A standalone EmbedUtils-compatible rich-message studio with legacy embeds and classic components, Components V2, persistent actions, stored messages, dashboard webhook delivery, Discord asset tools, JSON/YAML imports, utilities, and a multi-page visual builder.
install_msg: MessageStudio loaded. EmbedUtils-style commands are available under `[p]embed`; use `[p]embed dashboard` for the visual Components V2 builder.
short: Create, store, send, edit, and visually build embeds and Components V2 messages.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores saved message payloads and their author Discord user IDs, lock settings, and usage counts. For interactive messages it also stores message/channel IDs, the configuring user ID, component custom IDs, and configured action definitions until the message or binding is deleted.
